creator: kevin.mcaleavey@knosproject.com
text:
Security update for tor, updated from 0.2.2.33 to 0.2.2.34.

version 0.2.2.33 has been removed from dist site and replaced with 0.2.2.34

https://www.torproject.org/dist/

Fix: 

Correct the Makefile and distinfo to current distribution in https://www.torproject.org/dist/ ...
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to compile from ports. Build will fail, file not found. Needs to have distinfo and Makefile bumped to new version.
